issues.title: The maven dependency `spring-ai-mcp-server-spring-boot-starter` for studio MCP server is missing in org.springframework.ai BOM v1.0.0
issues.body: **Bug description** I followed the doc(https://docs.spring.io/spring-ai/reference/api/mcp/mcp-server-boot-starter-docs.html) to create a stdio MCP server by importing `spring-ai-mcp-server-spring-boot-starter`. Got the error `'dependencies.dependency.version' for org.springframework.ai:spring-ai-mcp-server-spring-boot-starter:jar is missing.` when using `spring-ai-mcp-server-spring-boot-starter` and `org.springframework.ai BOM v1.0.0` So I have to use `spring-ai-starter-mcp-server` which exists in `org.springframework.ai BOM v1.0.0` Maybe we should update the doc to `spring-ai-starter-mcp-server` , or support `spring-ai-mcp-server-spring-boot-starter` in `org.springframework.ai BOM v1.0.0`

comments.body: Yes, in fact, in the latest 1.1.0-SNAPSHOT release, the documentation has been fixed to `spring-ai-starter-mcp-server`:https://docs.spring.io/spring-ai/reference/1.1-SNAPSHOT/api/mcp/mcp-server-boot-starter-docs.html#_standard_mcp_server

> Yes, in fact, in the latest 1.1.0-SNAPSHOT release, the documentation has been fixed to `spring-ai-starter-mcp-server`:https://docs.spring.io/spring-ai/reference/1.1-SNAPSHOT/api/mcp/mcp-server-boot-starter-docs.html#_standard_mcp_server

OK. Thanks. Will close this issue.
